// Filter for positive odd integers (exclude non-integers and zero)
        long sum = lst.stream()
                     .filter(f -> f > 0 && f % 1 == 0) // positive and integer
                     .map(f -> ((int)f))               // cast to int
                     .filter(n -> n % 2 != 0)        // odd
                     .mapToInt(n -> n * n)           // square
                     .sum();                        // sum of squares
        return sum;
